description: raw.githubusercontent.com serves raw file contents from GitHub repositories over plain HTTPS URLs. Public documentation and community guidance indicate authenticated programmatic access should use GitHub’s REST API on api.github.com instead of treating raw.githubusercontent.com as a standalone API surface.
summary: raw.githubusercontent.com itself does not expose a documented developer integration surface; it is GitHub’s raw file delivery host for repository content, while GitHub’s actual developer APIs are on api.github.com.
